reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark downstream proof-class visibility satisfied; keep broader runner-readiness completeness and product-runner honesty claims separate.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names proof-class visibility in downstream summaries and reports, which is deterministic packet projection behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused runtime tests: evaluation summaries preserve proof.proofClass, and report proof summaries expose proofClassCounts alongside product-runner readiness.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep evaluation summary and report proof-summary tests current when proof metadata changes.
